name: Pocket Rhythm
explanation: A vintage Latin preset rhythm box in the Korg Mini-Pops lineage — distinct from the factory's kick/snare drum machines: an analog percussion set synthesised in real time (bongo, conga, claves, maracas, cowbell and cymbal). A MIDI note picks a voice (note % 6) into an 8-slot pool. Controls: Pitch (membrane tuning), Decay, Shaker (maracas/cymbal length), Cowbell (level/tone), Tone and Level.
